items.title: Batch fee-bump endpoint
items.description: Submit multiple signed XDRs in a single API call to reduce round-trips and improve throughput for high-volume apps.

items.title: Configurable webhook retry policy
items.description: Let tenants set custom retry intervals, max attempts, and dead-letter queue destinations for failed webhook deliveries.

items.title: Soroban simulation before fee bump
items.description: Automatically simulate Soroban contract invocations server-side to catch footprint errors before submitting the fee-bump envelope.

items.title: Multi-network support (Futurenet / custom)
items.description: Allow a single Fluid deployment to sponsor fees across Testnet, Futurenet, and custom Stellar networks simultaneously.

items.title: Spend threshold alerts
items.description: Email and webhook notifications when a tenant's XLM spend crosses configurable daily or monthly thresholds.

items.title: Go SDK v2 with context propagation
items.description: Rewrite fluid-go with full context.Context support, structured logging hooks, and OpenTelemetry trace propagation.

items.title: Per-tenant rate-limit tiers
items.description: Expose rate-limit configuration in the admin dashboard so operators can grant higher throughput to premium tenants.

items.title: GraphQL API for transaction history
items.description: Provide a GraphQL endpoint alongside the REST API so developers can query transaction history with flexible field selection.
